tools.name: check_mcp_server
tools.description: Pre-flight security verdict for an MCP server invocation. Judges BOTH server-level reputation AND the server's dependency graph (npm/pypi) against the DugganUSA threat-intel corpus (1.13M+ IOCs, Shai-Hulud + typosquat + LOLBin families). Returns BLOCK / ADVISORY / REVIEW / ALLOW with severity, evide

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "check_mcp_server" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Pre-flight security verdict for an MCP server invocation. Judges BOTH server-level reputation AND the server's dependency graph (npm/pypi) against the DugganUSA threat-intel corpus (1.13M+ IOCs, Shai-Hulud + typosquat + LOLBin families). Returns BLOCK / ADVISORY / ALLOW with severity, evidence, dep-" → after: "Pre-flight security verdict for an MCP server invocation. Judges BOTH server-level reputation AND the server's dependency graph (npm/pypi) against the DugganUSA threat-intel corpus (1.13M+ IOCs, Shai-Hulud + typosquat + LOLBin families). Returns BLOCK / ADVISORY / REVIEW / ALLOW with severity, evide"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
